fields.label: Nextcloud
fields.description: Private cloud storage solution with calendar, contacts and more

containers.name: nextcloud

POSTGRES_HOST=127.0.0.1
POSTGRES_DB=nextcloud
POSTGRES_USER=nextcloud
POSTGRES_PASSWORD=changeme
NEXTCLOUD_ADMIN_USER=admin
NEXTCLOUD_ADMIN_PASSWORD=changeme
NEXTCLOUD_TRUSTED_DOMAINS=localhost

options.label: MariaDB 11
options.app_env:
MYSQL_HOST=127.0.0.1
MYSQL_DATABASE=nextcloud
MYSQL_USER=nextcloud
MYSQL_PASSWORD=changeme
NEXTCLOUD_ADMIN_USER=admin
NEXTCLOUD_ADMIN_PASSWORD=changeme
NEXTCLOUD_TRUSTED_DOMAINS=localhost

fields.label: Gitea
fields.description: Lightweight self-hosted Git server with web UI

containers.name: gitea
containers.env:
GITEA__database__DB_TYPE=postgres
GITEA__database__HOST=127.0.0.1:5432
GITEA__database__NAME=gitea
GITEA__database__USER=gitea
GITEA__database__PASSWD=changeme
GITEA__server__ROOT_URL=http://localhost:3000
GITEA__server__SSH_PORT=2222

options.label: MySQL 8
options.app_env:
GITEA__database__DB_TYPE=mysql
GITEA__database__HOST=127.0.0.1:3306
GITEA__database__NAME=gitea
GITEA__database__USER=gitea
GITEA__database__PASSWD=changeme
GITEA__server__ROOT_URL=http://localhost:3000
GITEA__server__SSH_PORT=2222

fields.label: AWX (Ansible Tower)
fields.description: Open-source Ansible Tower: web UI for Ansible with task scheduling, inventory and job management

init_containers.name: awx-init
init_containers.args: -c "cp -r /etc/nginx/. /init-nginx/ && echo  | base64 -d > /init-tower/settings.py && echo  | base64 -d > /init-tower/uwsgi.ini && echo  | base64 -d > /init-nginx/nginx.conf"

containers.name: awx-web
containers.env:
DATABASE_USER=awx
DATABASE_PASSWORD=changeme
DATABASE_NAME=awx
DATABASE_HOST=127.0.0.1
DATABASE_PORT=5432
REDIS_HOST=127.0.0.1
REDIS_PORT=6379
SECRET_KEY=changeme_replace_with_50_char_random_string
AWX_ADMIN_USER=admin
AWX_ADMIN_PASSWORD=changeme
containers.args: -c "until python3 -c \"import socket;s=socket.create_connection(('${DATABASE_HOST:-127.0.0.1}',${DATABASE_PORT:-5432}),1);s.close()\" 2>/dev/null; do echo 'Waiting for postgres...'; sleep 3; done && awx-manage migrate && awx-manage createsuperuser --noinput --username ${AWX_ADMIN_USER:-admin} --email admin@localhost 2>/dev/null || true && awx-manage shell -c \"from django.contrib.auth.models import User;u=User.objects.get(username=__import__('os').environ.get('AWX_ADMIN_USER','admin'));u.set_password(__import__('os').environ.get('AWX_ADMIN_PASSWORD','changeme'));u.save()\" && exec /usr/bin/launch_awx_web.sh"

containers.name: awx-task
containers.env:
DATABASE_USER=awx
DATABASE_PASSWORD=changeme
DATABASE_NAME=awx
DATABASE_HOST=127.0.0.1
DATABASE_PORT=5432
REDIS_HOST=127.0.0.1
REDIS_PORT=6379
SECRET_KEY=changeme_replace_with_50_char_random_string
AWX_ADMIN_USER=admin
AWX_ADMIN_PASSWORD=changeme
